overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a cloaked character walking through a snowy mountain landscape. The scene features high-quality game engine graphics with dramatic sunlight illuminating snow-covered rocks and pine trees. The character progresses from a narrow rocky canyon into a more open forested valley.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain canyon pass between high rock walls

agents.ego_description: character in dark fur-trimmed cloak walking steadily through deep snow along a narrow mountain path

entered.detail: steep snow-covered rock face forming the left wall of the canyon
tall rocky cliff face covered in snow forming the right boundary
single evergreen tree standing in the valley ahead between the cliffs
intense sunlight creating lens flare and casting sharp shadows on the snow

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow snow-covered canyon flanked by steep rock walls on both sides. Bright midday sun shines directly ahead, illuminating the pristine snow and creating a stark contrast with the dark rocky cliffs. A solitary pine tree stands visible in the distance marking the path forward through the enclosed mountain pass.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain trail transitioning from canyon to forest

events.description: exiting narrow canyon as right rock wall recedes into forested slope

agents.ego_description: continuing along the snowy path as the terrain opens up to the right with emerging trees

entered.detail: cluster of snow-covered pine trees appearing on the right slope
expansive view of distant mountain ranges becoming visible ahead

segments.scene_description: The path curves gently left as the right cliff wall gives way to a forested slope. Pine trees begin to populate the right side of the frame while the left rocky terrain remains. The view ahead opens up to reveal distant mountain peaks, and the solitary tree from the canyon is left behind as the character enters a more transitional landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: forested mountain valley trail with panoramic views

events.description: entering dense pine forest section with wider valley views ahead

agents.ego_description: walking through a snowy forest trail surrounded by pine trees on both sides, heading toward an open valley

entered.detail: thick cluster of snow-laden evergreen trees lining the left side of the path
dense forest of pine trees extending up the right slope
broad snowy valley stretching into the distance with layered mountain ranges

segments.scene_description: The character now walks through a fully forested mountain valley with dense pine trees flanking both sides of the snowy trail. The rocky cliffs have receded, replaced by snow-covered evergreens. The path leads toward a wide open valley with hazy distant mountains visible under the bright sun, creating a serene winter wilderness atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a narrow, snowy canyon that gradually expands into a wide, forested mountain valley. It begins with the character walking between steep, dark rock walls under a bright midday sun that illuminates the pristine snow and a solitary pine tree in the distance. As the path curves gently to the left, the right cliff wall gives way to a forested slope, shifting the landscape from an enclosed pass to a transitional terrain where distant mountain peaks first become visible. The scene then opens further as the rocky cliffs recede entirely, replaced by dense pine trees flanking both sides of the snowy trail. Finally, the camera follows the character deep into the winter wilderness toward a wide, open valley beneath a hazy, sunlit horizon.
